creator: wargio@libero.it
text:
Hello Steffen, Wargio here.
Sorry for joining like this.
Let me explain who i am.

I used to work for NBS (you can check the git commits) and i still have admin access to their repos.

Before leaving the company i gave them 1y of free support on Naxsi since i'm the last developer of the project (this was 3y ago).

After that nobody took my position internally nor tried to contact me to continue the development of naxsi and when i reached out them for some feedback about the future of the project, i was informed that was dropped internally.

I decided that this WAF was too important to be left behind as abandonware and i decided to get it back by forking and fix any issue that was left behind.

In issue https://github.com/nbs-system/naxsi/issues/630, my ex colleague (ze42) asked me to officially move the project to my fork, since they internally also moved to use my fork instead of their own repo; so he asked internally an official approval to which i'm still waiting for.

I hope this answers to all your questions.
